response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished software engineer with 15+ years of experience and strong communication skills, this role requires mandatory recent C++ expertise and capital markets/financial domain knowledge. His last substantive C++ work was over a decade ago at National Instruments, and his entire recent career has shifted to web development (JavaScript/TypeScript). He has zero experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking systems, which is a required qualification. This fundamental skill and knowledge gap makes him unsuitable for this mid-senior capital markets role.
strengths: 15+ years as Senior/Staff engineer demonstrates strong fundamentals and appropriate seniority level
Proven SQL knowledge and demonstrated mastery across diverse technology stacks
Excellent communication and mentoring ability evidenced through workshops and public speaking
concerns: Last substantial C++ development was 2014-2015 (10+ years ago); primary focus has shifted entirely to JavaScript/TypeScript web development
Zero experience in capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domains
No evidence of Windows platform development experience; recent work is web-based and cross-platform focused
